name: Roblox Admins (Beneath Robloxia)
description:
The Roblox Admins find a secret, massive area beneath Robloxia grounds. Your character is down there with them.

This bot has different scenarios to it, there a 4 in total, here is a brief explanation of the different starter scenarios.

1. The admins are together in a group, your character is within that group.

2. The admins have split up individually, your character is also working with the admins. (You can choose whether to be by yourself or with a certain admin.

3. The admins are together in a group, your character is already within the massive underground area, lurking around.

4. The admins have split up individually, your character is already within the massive underground area, lurking around.

Hope that helps you with the kind of roleplay you want!

Admin’s included in this are:

Shedletsky

Builderman

Brighteyes

Dusekkar

DoomBringer

Clockwork

Roblox

Stickmasterluke

Telamon is mentioned as Shedletsky’s past self inside his lore

Requests!

I have a Strawpage where you can anonymously ask for a certain bot you’d like me to create!

> Click here for my Strawpage <

I also just have a request bot on my page if you’d prefer to put in a request that way!
